summary.en: Tuya T5AI platform — dual-core ARM Cortex-M33 with on-chip KWS, voice activity detection, and lightweight AI inference, plus Wi-Fi 6 / BLE 5.4 connectivity. Rich peripheral interfaces for any IoT scenario, purpose-built for low-power edge-cloud multimodal LLM interaction across voice, video, audio, and GUI.
summary.zh-CN: 涂鸦 T5AI 平台 — 双核 ARM Cortex-M33，片上集成语音唤醒（KWS）、语音检测与轻量 AI 推理，搭载 Wi-Fi 6 / BLE 5.4。丰富的硬件外设接口，满足各类 IoT 场景，专为低功耗端云多模态大模型交互打造——语音、视频、音频与 GUI 图形化界面交互。

summary.en: GigaDevice GD32VW553 — RISC-V wireless MCU @160MHz with Wi-Fi 6 (2.4GHz) and Bluetooth LE 5.2, 320KB SRAM and up to 4MB on-chip flash.
summary.zh-CN: 兆易创新 GD32VW553 — RISC-V 无线 MCU，主频 160MHz，集成 Wi-Fi 6（2.4GHz）与蓝牙 BLE 5.2，320KB SRAM，片上 Flash 最高 4MB。

summary.en: Tuya T2 platform — ARM968E-S with Wi-Fi 802.11b/g/n and BLE 4.2 for cost-effective IoT.
summary.zh-CN: 涂鸦 T2 平台 — ARM968E-S，支持 Wi-Fi 802.11b/g/n 与 BLE 4.2，面向高性价比 IoT 应用。

summary.en: BK7231N platform — ARM968E-S with Wi-Fi 802.11b/g/n and BLE 4.2 (same silicon as Tuya T2).
summary.zh-CN: BK7231N 平台 — ARM968E-S，支持 Wi-Fi 802.11b/g/n 与 BLE 4.2（与涂鸦 T2 同款芯片）。

summary.en: Tuya T1 platform — ARM Cortex-M4 with Wi-Fi 802.11b/g/n and BLE 4.2 for general-purpose IoT.
summary.zh-CN: 涂鸦 T1 平台 — ARM Cortex-M4，支持 Wi-Fi 802.11b/g/n 与 BLE 4.2，面向通用 IoT 应用。

summary.en: Tuya T2AI platform — ARM968E-S with Wi-Fi 802.11b/g/n, BLE 4.2, and 4 MB flash for display/media AIoT.
summary.zh-CN: 涂鸦 T2AI 平台 — ARM968E-S，支持 Wi-Fi 802.11b/g/n、BLE 4.2，搭载 4 MB Flash，面向显示/多媒体 AIoT 应用。

summary.en: Tuya T3AI platform — ARM Cortex-M33 with Wi-Fi 6, BLE 5.4, QSPI display, and audio for edge-AI.
summary.zh-CN: 涂鸦 T3AI 平台 — ARM Cortex-M33，支持 Wi-Fi 6 / BLE 5.4，集成 QSPI 显示与音频接口，面向端侧 AI 应用。

summary.en: Tuya T3 platform — ARM Cortex-M33 with Wi-Fi 6, BLE 4.2, and SPI Ethernet (CH390) for connected devices.
summary.zh-CN: 涂鸦 T3 平台 — ARM Cortex-M33，支持 Wi-Fi 6 / BLE 4.2，并通过 SPI 外接以太网（CH390），面向有线/无线联网设备。

summary.en: Realtek RTL8720CF platform — ARM Cortex-M33 with Wi-Fi 802.11b/g/n (WPA3) and BLE 5.0.
summary.zh-CN: 瑞昱 RTL8720CF 平台 — ARM Cortex-M33，支持 Wi-Fi 802.11b/g/n（WPA3）与 BLE 5.0。

summary.en: Realtek RTL8720CF-VU2 platform — ARM Cortex-M33 with Wi-Fi 802.11b/g/n (WPA3), BLE 5.0, and 4 MB flash.
summary.zh-CN: 瑞昱 RTL8720CF-VU2 平台 — ARM Cortex-M33，支持 Wi-Fi 802.11b/g/n（WPA3）与 BLE 5.0，搭载 4 MB Flash。

summary.en: Espressif ESP32 platform — dual-core Xtensa LX6 @240MHz with Wi-Fi 802.11b/g/n and Bluetooth 4.2 / BLE. 520KB SRAM, rich peripherals (capacitive touch, DAC, Ethernet MAC) for general-purpose IoT.
summary.zh-CN: 乐鑫 ESP32 平台 — 双核 Xtensa LX6，主频 240MHz，支持 Wi-Fi 802.11b/g/n 与蓝牙 4.2 / BLE。520KB SRAM，外设丰富（电容触摸、DAC、以太网 MAC），面向通用 IoT 应用。

summary.en: Espressif ESP32-C3 platform — single-core 32-bit RISC-V @160MHz with Wi-Fi 802.11b/g/n and Bluetooth LE 5.0. 400KB SRAM, 22 GPIOs, a cost-effective and secure choice for connected devices.
summary.zh-CN: 乐鑫 ESP32-C3 平台 — 单核 32 位 RISC-V，主频 160MHz，支持 Wi-Fi 802.11b/g/n 与蓝牙 BLE 5.0。400KB SRAM，22 个 GPIO，面向高性价比、高安全的联网设备。

summary.en: Espressif ESP32-C6 platform — 32-bit RISC-V @160MHz with Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax, 2.4GHz), Bluetooth LE 5.3, and IEEE 802.15.4 (Zigbee / Thread). 512KB SRAM for multi-protocol smart-home edge devices.
summary.zh-CN: 乐鑫 ESP32-C6 平台 — 32 位 RISC-V，主频 160MHz，支持 Wi-Fi 6（802.11ax，2.4GHz）、蓝牙 BLE 5.3 及 IEEE 802.15.4（Zigbee / Thread）。512KB SRAM，面向多协议智能家居边缘设备。

summary.en: Espressif ESP32-S3 platform — dual-core Xtensa LX7 @240MHz with Wi-Fi 802.11b/g/n, Bluetooth LE 5.0, USB-OTG, and vector instructions for on-device AI/ML. 512KB SRAM with octal PSRAM support for audio and display AIoT.
summary.zh-CN: 乐鑫 ESP32-S3 平台 — 双核 Xtensa LX7，主频 240MHz，支持 Wi-Fi 802.11b/g/n、蓝牙 BLE 5.0、USB-OTG，并内置面向端侧 AI/ML 的向量指令。512KB SRAM 并支持 Octal PSRAM，面向音频与显示类 AIoT 应用。

summary.en: Espressif ESP32-P4 platform — dual-core RISC-V @400MHz with a RISC-V LP core, large internal SRAM and PSRAM support, MIPI-CSI/DSI, and rich peripherals for HMI and edge-AI. No on-chip radio — wireless is provided by a companion ESP32-C6 (Wi-Fi 6 / BLE).
summary.zh-CN: 乐鑫 ESP32-P4 平台 — 双核 RISC-V，主频 400MHz，另含 RISC-V 低功耗核，内置大容量 SRAM 并支持 PSRAM，集成 MIPI-CSI/DSI 与丰富外设，面向人机交互（HMI）与端侧 AI。芯片本身无射频，无线能力由配套 ESP32-C6（Wi-Fi 6 / BLE）提供。
